query: What do you have by the Universal House of Justice?
response: The library holds 475 documents by the Universal House of Justice, covering topics like administrative guidance and social issues. For example, in their messages, the Universal House of Justice emphasizes the importance of ["individual growth"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Administrative/the-five-year-plan-2006-2011-messages-of-the-universal-house-of-justice#p1670) as part of the broader community development. This reflects their ongoing effort to guide the Bahá'í community in both spiritual and practical matters.

response: The library holds 41,590 Bahá'í documents across various collections, including Baha'i Books, Reference, Papers, and News. In these writings, the teachings are described as ["heavenly outpourings of grace"](https://siftersearch.com/library/Baha'i/Core%20Publications/selections-from-the-writings-of-abdul-baha#p504), *Selections from the Writings of ’Abdu’l-Bahá*, which cleanse the human heart. The Báb also speaks of those who will be ["honored with true faith"](https://oceanlibrary.com/selections-from-the-writings-of-the-bab), *Selections from the Writings of the Báb*, highlighting the transformative power of embracing the divine message.

query: What Hindu scriptures do you carry?
response: The library holds 127 Hindu texts, featuring collections like Bhakti and Devotional Works and Epics. As the *Bhagavad Gita* reveals, Krishna grants Arjuna ["sense divine... new light"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda) to perceive divine glory. Similarly, the *Upanishads* encourage us to ["make our hearts free from prejudice"](https://oceanlibrary.com/hymns-of-atharva-veda) to draw inspiration and wisdom from these sacred writings.
